title: Cliselda Acrylic Display Case with Black Base, Assemble Acrylic Display Box, Acrylic Box Curiosity Cube Plastic Dustproof Showcase for Display Collectible Action Figures Toys (30x20x20cm)
features: 【DIMENSION】 30x20x20 cm(12x8x8inch). This is a super sturdy large rectangular plastic display box, perfect for storing and displaying things like trophies, antique vases, and large models etc.
【NOTE】Cliselda acrylic display box comes with film protection, please tear off the protective film attached to the acrylic panel before use, otherwise you will get an opaque product!

【LUXURY DECORATIVE EFFECT】This display case takes high quality acrylic for great clarity. Thees clear acrylic panels with a thickened black base forms a dustproof and beautiful display box. Better display and organize your collection.

【VERSATILE DISPLAY BOX】The display cabinets are the perfect complement to business displays or household items. Perfect for stores to display art materials, collectibles, figures, dolls, and so on. It makes your treasured item go from plain on the shelf to being highlighted beautifully.

【ASSEMBLED NEEDED】 This clear display case needs to be assembled, Fittings are included. Packge inclued: display case box, installation manual, gifted(glove+cleaning cloth). Please refer to the instructions for assembly. Once assembled you will get a super sturdy display box!

MULTI-PURPOSED COUNTERTOP BOX DISPLAY These display risers are an excellent way to show off your collectibles, artifacts, sports memorabilia, toys, figurines, antiques, jewellery, dolls, action figures, souveniers, models, statues, heirlooms, and sculptures. Can be used at home, in retail stores, museums, or trade shows. Specification & Main Feature Size:12x8x8 Inch (30x20x20 cm) Package: Wrapped in protective layers Material: Clear Acrylic Plastic Color: Transparent Need Remove the Protective Film Need Self-assembly Attention Please ! ! ! Cliselda acrylic display box comes with film protection, please tear off the protective film attached to the acrylic panel before use, otherwise you will get an opaque product! The Acrylic Display Case Need to be Assembled The display riser is not fully assembled,it needs to be assembled. Fittings and gloves are including. Pleease tear up the protective film before you install it. It is more stable with the screws. After about 10 minutes, your patience will be exchanged for a delicate and durable acrylic display frame. If you have difficulty assembling, please see the pictures page and watch the video step by step to install. 3mm Thick Clear Acrylic This display box takes high quality acrylic for excellent clarity. It makes your treasured collectibles go from plain on the shelf to being highlighted beautifully. Super Sturdy Screw Design This display box panel is designed with screw articulation. Trust us, once you have assembled it according to the instructions, you will get a clear box that is as sturdy as a tank! Thickened Eemovable Black Base These clear acrylic panels with a thickened black base forms a dustproof and beautiful display box, which will keep your collections dust-free, reduce sunlight and ultraviolet radiation.
